title: Cockroach Janta Party protest LIVE: CJP big Delhi stir tomorrow; high turnout anticipated, appeal for peace made
description: Cockroach Janta Party protest LIVE: Satirical outfit 'Cockroach Janta Party's' (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke is flying to India from the US to lead a proposed protest at Delhi's Jantar Mantar on Saturday, permission of which has not been sought.
